channel.title: Pippy Blog
channel.description: Practical tips for new parents on baby sleep, feeding, diapers, and milestones.

item.title: When Do Babies Roll Over? Timeline and Red Flags
item.description: Pediatric guidance on when rolling happens, what to watch for, and what to do if it has not started.

item.title: Baby Gas Relief: The 3-Step Sequence Most Parents Do Out of Order
item.description: A pediatric-reviewed guide to safe, fast gas relief plus red flags every parent should know.

item.title: Baby Babbling Timeline: What to Listen For, Month by Month
item.description: Month-by-month listening guide from cooing at 2 months to first words, plus when silence is worth a call.

item.title: Safe Sleep Guidelines: The Essentials
item.description: AAP-aligned safe sleep rules every caregiver should know, plus the mistakes that slip past new parents.

item.title: Baby Fever: When to Call the Doctor
item.description: Age-based thresholds, warning signs, and a clear decision tree for when fever needs a pediatrician call.

item.title: Signs of Dehydration in Babies
item.description: Specific wet-diaper counts, skin and soft-spot signs, and emergency thresholds to watch for.

item.title: Baby Poop Color Guide: What is Normal and What is Not
item.description: Visual guide from meconium to first foods, plus the colors that need a pediatrician call today.

item.title: Baby Constipation: What is Normal, What is Not
item.description: How to tell real constipation from normal grunting, safe home relief, and when to call the pediatrician.

item.title: The 4, 8, and 12 Month Sleep Regressions
item.description: What is actually happening at each regression, how long it really lasts, and how to keep your sanity.

item.title: Baby Teething Timeline: Which Tooth, When
item.description: A month-by-month tooth eruption guide, typical symptoms, and what does not count as a teething sign.

item.title: Baby Eczema Basics: Causes, Triggers, and What Works
item.description: Identifying infant eczema, daily skincare that works, and when a pediatric dermatologist should get involved.

item.title: How Much Should a Newborn Eat?
item.description: Hour-by-hour and day-by-day feeding amounts for the first month, plus what to do on cluster feeding nights.
